name: phase25_27_refinement
outcome_goal: Refinement loop: natural language instructions modify manifests, persistent bar UI, context menu

jobs.label: p25_refine_api
jobs.prompt:
You are working at the Praxis repository root (paths below are relative to it).

Two changes:

1. Add POST /api/manifests/refine to surfaces/api/workflow_api.py (inline in do_POST before _ROUTES):
- Accepts {manifest_id, instruction}
- Loads current manifest from app_manifests
- Calls ManifestGenerator.refine(manifest_id, instruction)
- Returns {manifest_id, manifest, version, explanation, changelog}

2. Update runtime/manifest_generator.py refine() method:
- Load current manifest JSON
- Build prompt: 'Here is the current V2 manifest: <JSON>. The user wants: <instruction>. Modify the manifest to satisfy the request. Return ONLY the modified JSON. Keep version:2 format with quadrants. Only use these module IDs: metric, stat-row, chart, activity-feed, status-grid, markdown, key-value, data-table, text-input, intent-box, dropdown-select, button-row, file-drop, dispatch-form, search-panel, document-processor, data-pipeline, workflow-status, bug-card, model-card, registry-browser, workflow-builder, object-type-browser, schema-editor.'
- Call Claude CLI, parse JSON response
- Save new version to app_manifests + app_manifest_history
- Return GeneratedManifest with changelog describing what changed

Write both files.

jobs.label: p26_refinement_bar
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create src/grid/RefinementBar.tsx:

A persistent bottom bar for iterative manifest refinement.

Props: { manifestId: string, onRefined: (newManifest: any) => void }

UI:
- Sticky at bottom of viewport, z-index 50
- Dark bar: bg var(--bg-card), border-top 1px solid var(--border)
- Text input (flex 1): 'Tell me what to change...' placeholder
- Submit button (accent color)
- On submit: POST to /api/manifests/refine with {manifest_id: manifestId, instruction: text}
- Show loading state during refinement
- On success: show changelog text, 'Accept' button (applies by reloading page) and 'Undo' button
- Cmd+K / Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut to focus the input
- Dismissible with Escape key

Also create src/grid/RefinementBar.css.

Integrate into App.tsx: render RefinementBar below QuadrantGrid for all V2 manifests. Pass current manifestId and a reload handler.

Write all files.

jobs.label: p27_context_menu
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create src/grid/ContextMenu.tsx:

Right-click context menu on quadrant cells with module-specific actions.

Props: { x: number, y: number, moduleId: string, moduleType: string, quadrantId: string, onAction: (instruction: string) => void, onClose: () => void }

Menu items depend on module type:
- display: 'Change data source', 'Add column', 'Change chart type', 'Remove module'
- input: 'Change placeholder', 'Change label', 'Remove module'
- tool: 'Configure pipeline', 'Change endpoint', 'Remove module'
- composite: 'Change object type', 'Toggle selection publishing', 'Remove module'

Each action calls onAction with a pre-filled refinement instruction, e.g.:
- 'Add column' -> 'Add a new column to the data table in quadrant {quadrantId}'
- 'Change chart type' -> 'Change the chart in quadrant {quadrantId} to a pie chart'

The onAction callback should focus the RefinementBar and pre-fill it with the instruction.

Styling: dark popup, position absolute at (x,y), z-index 200, shadow, rounded corners.

Integrate into QuadrantGrid.tsx: onContextMenu handler on each cell, renders ContextMenu.

Also create src/grid/ContextMenu.css. Write all files.
